IHttpHeaderConfig Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The IHttpHeaderConfig type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
ApiHeaders
Defines the HTTP headers which are appended to API responses.
Headers
Defines the HTTP headers which are appended to all responses.
